name: Chicken Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 Ounces Cream of Chicken Soup, condensed
3/4 Cup Grated Parmesan Cheese,  see note
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook broccoli in boiling water according to package directions. Drain.
2. Spread the cooked broccoli in a 9x13 pan.
3. Mix chicken, soup, mayonnaise, and 1/2 cup cheese in a medium bowl.
4. Spread the chicken mixture over the broccoli.
5. Sprinkle the remaining 1/4 cup cheese on top.
6. Cover the dish with foil and freeze.
To prepare for serving:
7. Thaw the dish.
8. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
9. Bake the covered dish for 40 minutes.
10. Remove the foil, stir to bring the colder food in the center to the outside.
11. Continue baking for an additional 20 minutes.
